items.name_cn:
Shipped! Chanel✨ New Silver CF
Glistening and shiny 🤩 Absolutely stunning! Classic silhouette + Champagne gold, sophisticated! Shimmers in different lights, beautiful from every angle. Special craftsmanship used; though it's lambskin, you don't need to worry about scratches as this leather is very durable. Versatile style, suitable for both casual and formal wear.
Size 25cm,
Number: 1112 Silver Pearl Lambskin

items.name_en: Shipping Large Size OHANEL🚩🚩🚩Vintage Have you seen this? | Who doesn't love Black Silver!!🍋🍋 Lazy style Black Silver hobo hits my aesthetic! Silver side bar, zip double C pendant, embossed logo, love every detail ahhh! Casual yet high-end look. Handheld or underarm or clutch. Soft, supple leather with great texture, maximum lazy vibes!! I suggest everyone get one! Love brain at peak, can't control this silver bar hobo. Glossy Large Size Shoulder Crossbody Bag. Low-key, lazy, casual. This series is too hot. Shoulder or underarm use, crossbody carry. Beauty and practicality combined. Really practical for going out! Size: Large 40*30*15

items.name_cn:
SIDE TRUNK M46358#Inspection-free Version#
▪️Size: 21*14*6cm▪️
A viral hit in the C-position, this soft Side Trunk box 👜
Captures hearts with its high-end look, breaking away from traditional hard boxes with a bold soft-and-hard design. Detachable handles and shoulder straps make it truly amazing. With the high-visual appeal of a bestseller and high usage rate, it offers a large capacity. Stylish and lazy-chic, yet retains a cool temperament. A must-have with a premium look!

items.name_en: SIDE TRUNK Medium Handbag【M14046】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
SIDE TRUNK Medium Handbag【M14046】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
This Side Trunk Sj medium handbag captures the playful spirit of the Murakami edition series with a whimsical Monogram pattern, incorporating reinforced metal corners and the iconic S-lock clasp into soft calfskin. It easily accommodates daily essentials. The square silhouette pays homage to the brand's classic trunks, with a detachable nail-studded handle and shoulder strap for flexible carrying.
Size: 23.5 x 16 x 8.5 cm.

items.name_cn:
Siena Shoulder Bag
▫️Model 846705 Black
▫️Dimensions 22.5*14*8
The Gucci Siena small shoulder bag continues the evolution of the brand's iconic Horsebit element. Crafted from fine glossy leather, this bag features a structured silhouette with a half-horsebit buckle detail inspired by the 1970s. It is accented with gold-tone hardware and features a three-compartment interior with a zip pocket.
